summary: Polish the inverse pinch cursor and compact controller handoff.
scope: Use a 28px inverse-color pinch cursor with no shadow.
Hide the page entry under the compact native controller.
Restore full-width Chinese camera control buttons.
notes: The pinch cursor uses CSS mix-blend-mode: difference so it adapts to the page beneath it.
A real Chrome window cannot be embedded in the webpage; the page entry is hidden while it is expanded.
